canonical_name: Prior-art / novelty audit (blinded cross-script admin schema induction)
research_question: Is blinding-as-ablation on a decipherable script + structure-only role/schema induction + learned cross-script transfer gate, held out by site/scribe/family, novel vs prior art?
mechanical_verdict: NOVELTY_SUPPORTED (combinatorial); 0/20 works satisfy the defining conjunction
source_dependencies: external literature only; nearest neighbour Born/Monroe/Kelley/Sarkar 2025 (Proto-Elamite); Helena Tomas (LA vs LB admin); Corazza et al. 2021
algorithm_model: structured literature search + hand-backfilled synthesis (novelty-boundary agent failed StructuredOutput, backfilled by hand)
search_space_params: 4 novelty axes; defining conjunction of 4 primitives
primary_metric_value: 0/20 works satisfy full conjunction (REPORT_ONLY, prior_art_register.csv has 20 rows)
uncertainty: honest residual: primitives individually precedented; novelty is combinatorial, not a gate on the science
strongest_authorized_claim: The combination is unprecedented in the 20 audited works
forbidden_stronger_claim: That the method is guaranteed to work / is scientifically validated
limitations_blockers: One agent failed StructuredOutput; verdict explicitly attackable; novelty not load-bearing on the science

canonical_name: Source / licence audit + de-phoneticisation blinding design
research_question: Is DAMOS (Linear B) sufficient as backbone, and how to blind it (strip phonetic value) so structure-only role induction can be validated without leakage?
mechanical_verdict: No licensing/repro blocker; blinding = map each syllabogram to opaque graphic sign-ID; transliteration/lemma/Greek/gloss -> EVAL_ONLY
data_sources: DAMOS Linear B (in repo); LA silver + SigLA; corpus_version=silver 1,341 LA inscriptions / DAMOS 13,562 wordforms
source_dependencies: DAMOS primary editions; LiBER/PA-I-TO flagged TO_AUDIT (LB-only enrichment)
features_channels: Primary transferable: opaque sign identity + structure/position + logograms + numerals/fractions + support + site + recurrence + damage. Excluded (LB-only): scribal hand, fine chronology, fine layout
uncertainty: Top transfer risk flagged: LA<->LB sign-inventory non-homomorphy
contamination_leakage: Blinding firewall designed to prevent phonetic-value leak into model-visible graph
strongest_authorized_claim: DAMOS is a sufficient blinded LB backbone; LA is natively opaque
forbidden_stronger_claim: Any semantic/phonetic use of the eval-only key
limitations_blockers: Sign-inventory non-homomorphy => represent signs within-script-opaque + AB-shared bridge only

canonical_name: Canonical de-phoneticised transferable document graph (LB + LA), Stage 4 / 4.1 / 4.2
research_question: Can DAMOS (LB) and LA silver be instantiated in one opaque, non-semantic heterogeneous document graph with transferable structural channels and no sound-value leak?
claim_layer: L2 (document structure) — data representation; no L3+ output
method_family: graph construction / corpus engineering (build_linear_b_graph.py, build_linear_a_compatible_graph.py, linear_a_structural_recovery.py)
mechanical_verdict: Frozen graphs; determinism + no-semantic-fields + feature-transferability tests pass
data_sources: DAMOS LB; LA silver inscriptions_structured.json (stream tokens); corpus_version=silver
effective_n: LB 5,799 graphs / LA 1,341 graphs (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT stage4_2 manifest); independence_unit=document
features_channels: opaque B_SIGN/B_LOGO/B_MEAS/B_QUAL; LA A_SIGN (disjoint from B_SIGN); NUMERAL/ROW/ENTRY/WORD_FORM/SIGN channels
search_space_params: 89 syll / 155 logo / 17 meas LB vocab; A_SIGN vocab reported 259 (channel audit)
segmentation: entry/row/word/sign token typing from silver stream
candidate_languages_hypotheses: NONE (A_SIGN vocab kept disjoint; no LB meaning imported)
preregistration_plan_hash: manifest hashes: lb_graph 81a5d6de, la_graph 1b1d56bb (stage4_2); schema 628f49fb; feature_sets 03c83b81 (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT)
primary_metric_value: LA channels recovered (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT stage4_2 manifest): NUMERAL 1276, ROW 3435, ENTRY 3738, WORD_FORM 3147, SIGN 5792, LOGOGRAM 654, FRACTION 311, MEASURE_MARKER 52; 1056 'other' -> 91% resolved (LOGOGRAM 654/FRACTION 311/OTHER 52/DAMAGED 9/UNRESOLVED 30); scribes recovered 293 (3944/5799 docs); 19 canonical sites
uncertainty: LA logograms/fractions opaque (value withheld); DOCUMENT_SERIES genuinely absent in LA
ablations_robustness: Stage 4.1 corrected 5 defects (site mis-map, empty scribe channel, unparsed LA channels, cardinality, formula clusters)
contamination_leakage: eval-only sound key gitignored/never redistributed; no LB commodity meaning imported to LA
strongest_authorized_claim: A reproducible blinded document graph exists for LB and LA in one schema
forbidden_stronger_claim: Any equivalence of LA logograms with LB logograms of similar shape
limitations_blockers: LA MEASURE_MARKER channel unknown; SigLA glyph-level sub-typing of 'other' deferred; A_SIGN=259 reported here conflicts with the corrected real-syllabary~=92 count from the constraint-expansion campaign (cross-lineage note)
supersession_relations: Underlies ADMIN-04..08 and all no_human_structure work; inherited by observable_channels

research_question: Can documents be grouped into formula clusters blind-by-construction (grouping only, no semantic labels) for leakage-safe folds?
features_channels: notation-type signature / positional structure (no word-form identity)
heldout_design: clusters used to prevent train/test leakage across sibling documents
ablations_robustness: blindness enforced by construction (no labels used)
strongest_authorized_claim: Documents can be grouped for leakage-safe folds without semantic input
forbidden_stronger_claim: That clusters correspond to meaningful document types/functions
limitations_blockers: Grouping only; carries no functional interpretation
supersession_relations: Supports splits for the (never-run) modeling stages

canonical_name: LB role ontology freeze (8 coarse / 17 fine classes)
research_question: What frozen role ontology + gold tiers + QC agreement gate define the blinded semantic-role benchmark?
claim_layer: L4 (functional role) — target definition only; nothing scored
implementation_status: DESIGNED_NOT_RUN (frozen policy; no gold corpus/splits/models yet)
search_space_params: 4 separate prediction targets; gold tiers A/B/C/X; trivial vs NONTRIVIAL_UNSEEN_FORM load-bearing
primary_metric_value: QC gate: Krippendorff alpha >= 0.80 primary / 0.67-0.80 provisional (frozen threshold)
contamination_leakage: leakage rules frozen before any gold labeled
strongest_authorized_claim: A frozen, pre-registered role benchmark specification exists
forbidden_stronger_claim: Any role assignment to real LA forms
limitations_blockers: No gold corpus, splits, or models built under this ontology
supersession_relations: Defines the target that ADMIN-06 pilot tests feasibility of; later shortcut-avoided by observable_channels pivot

canonical_name: Automated annotation feasibility pilot (Stage 5.1, model-based double annotation)
research_question: At pilot scale, can the blinded coarse-role annotation task reach the frozen inter-annotator agreement threshold to yield usable primary gold?
claim_layer: L4 (functional role) — feasibility of gold, not a reading
method_family: annotation feasibility pilot (two model annotators, different framings, + adjudication; wf_4ab5c3e6-b55)
data_sources: 160 distinct LB content word-form types (stratified KN80/nonKN80, hapax80/recurrent80); corpus_version=DAMOS-derived graph
source_dependencies: ADMIN-03 graph + ADMIN-05 ontology; DAMOS eval-layer transliteration used as annotator context
effective_n: 160 items; grouped by form-family; nontrivial GOLD_A agreed = 4 (independence_unit=form-family)
features_channels: eval-layer transliteration + entry context + site/series given to annotators
algorithm_model: two LLM annotators (lexical-first vs structure-first framings), blind to each other, adjudicated
search_space_params: coarse 8-class ontology; gold tiers per frozen policy
preregistration_plan_hash: deterministic seed; frozen Stage-5 policy 781902c0; SITE_TEST_A/B frozen
heldout_design: SITE_TEST_A (train nonKN->test KN); SITE_TEST_B (train KN->test nonKN); pilot form-families + 342 docs recorded for exclusion from future holdout
positive_negative_controls: 1/8 null baseline for power sim; min detectable K=16
null_family_run_count: power simulation vs 1/8 null (moot — alpha gates first)
primary_metric_value: Krippendorff alpha=0.614 (raw 0.725); GOLD_A agreed yield 5.6% (9/160); nontrivial GOLD_A agreed=4 (KN 0/nonKN 4/hapax 1); est unseen-form GOLD_A ~39 units; est nonKN GOLD_A ~140 units (all VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT pilot_stats.json)
uncertainty: alpha is model-based -> OPTIMISTIC upper bound; true inter-human alpha unknown and could be lower (NO_POWER robust if anything)
power: min detectable K=16 at p=0.40 vs 1/8 null, 80% power; unseen-form (~39) and nonKN (~140) partitions would be powered IF agreement adequate; but alpha fails first -> power 0.0 in practice
ablations_robustness: failure concentrates in hapax forms + tiny secure-GOLD_A yield
contamination_leakage: pilot items burned from future sealed holdout (pilot_exclusion_manifest.json)
strongest_authorized_claim: The blinded coarse-role gold task is underpowered at this scale with model annotators
forbidden_stronger_claim: That the task is impossible in principle, or any LA role output
limitations_blockers: Model annotators != human epigraphers; verdict not retuned per discipline
supersession_relations: Motivates ADMIN-07 (human package) and the whole no_human pivot; NOT retuned

canonical_name: Human-expert annotation package (blinded double annotation) — gate BLOCKED
research_question: Can qualified human Mycenaean epigraphers double-annotate a curated GOLD_A-eligible subset to clear the frozen agreement gate (which model annotators failed)?
method_family: human annotation package prep + refuse-without-data ingestion tooling
implementation_status: DESIGNED_NOT_RUN (BLOCKED: QUALIFIED_HUMAN_ANNOTATORS_REQUIRED; no human data exists)
mechanical_verdict: BLOCKED / UNTESTED — validate/compare/adjudicate tools REFUSE without genuine submissions; no agreement computed
data_sources: 160 items drawn deterministically from 2,454 eligible independent forms (auto-pilot families + in-pilot docs + stem-siblings + formula siblings excluded); balanced 40x4
source_dependencies: ADMIN-03 graph, ADMIN-05 ontology, ADMIN-06 exclusion manifest
features_channels: packet fields: anon id, doc id, LB reading, entry context, series, site, findspot, support, scribe hand
algorithm_model: NOT_APPLICABLE (human task); two blinded packets + blank templates
search_space_params: seed 20260708; site quota KN80/nonKN80; hapax80/recurrent80; series_min_distinct 8
heldout_design: cluster exclusion policy; holdout not yet chosen
primary_metric_value: NONE COMPUTED (blocked); gate = frozen 0.80/0.667 alpha (to be applied only after two genuine submissions)
power: would test whether real humans clear the bar on securely-classifiable subset that models failed
contamination_leakage: reading-bearing packets gitignored (DAMOS courtesy); templates/manifest/hashes/code committed
strongest_authorized_claim: A ready, blinded human-annotation package exists; feasibility UNTESTED
forbidden_stronger_claim: That human annotation would/would not succeed; any LA inference
limitations_blockers: Owner will not recruit human annotators -> route CLOSED_BY_OWNER; scientific_verdict=UNTESTED
supersession_relations: Owner constraint -> pivot to no_human_structure programme (parent of everything downstream)

research_question: Are published LB label sources (DAMOS, Ventris-Chadwick, Aura Jorro/DMic) independent, or do they share one decipherment (so their agreement is not independent consensus)?
mechanical_verdict: All content-role sources descend from same primary editions + the single 1952 decipherment => ONE SHARED_DECIPHERMENT vote; only STRUCTURAL_RULES is EDITION_INDEPENDENT
source_dependencies: DMic derives from V-C; all share primary editions + 1952 decipherment
features_channels: label provenance classes: SHARED_DECIPHERMENT vs EDITION_INDEPENDENT
primary_metric_value: content-role labels all in ONE SHARED_DECIPHERMENT cluster (93 forms) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT source_labels_summary.json dependency_clusters)
power: forecasts a thin non-trivial SILVER_A pool (a NO_POWER route to test, not assume)
ablations_robustness: LF_CROSS_SOURCE_CONCORDANCE may count agreement only ACROSS independence classes
contamination_leakage: prevents false 'independent consensus' inflation of gold
strongest_authorized_claim: Only trivial STRUCTURAL_RULES labels are edition-independent; content roles share one decipherment
forbidden_stronger_claim: Treating multi-source agreement as independent evidence
limitations_blockers: Consequence: non-trivial SILVER_A pool is thin by construction
supersession_relations: Determines feasibility ceiling for NOHUM-02/03; forecast confirmed by NOHUM-04 power gate

research_question: How many non-trivial, edition-defensible role labels can be built deterministically from published LB indexes, and which load-bearing role classes are present?
method_family: deterministic label extraction from cited indexes (lb_indexes.py, build_source_labels.py)
scientific_outcome: NOT_APPLICABLE (corpus build; feasibility fed to power gate)
mechanical_verdict: 66 non-trivial REFERENCE_GOLD_A; only 2 of 4 load-bearing classes present (OPERATOR + QUALIFIER absent)
effective_n: REFERENCE_GOLD_A nontrivial=66; 66 lexical families / 63 morphological families; KN 38 / nonKN 46 (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT source_labels_summary.json)
search_space_params: 93 word-form labels total: REFERENCE_GOLD_A 66 (PLACE 43, HUMAN_OR_INSTITUTION 23), WEAK_SILVER_B 20 (OPERATOR 13, QUALIFIER 7), STRUCTURAL_CONTROL_A 7 + 15,613 notation nodes
heldout_design: structural labels excluded from load-bearing eval (Sec II firewall)
primary_metric_value: 66 REFERENCE_GOLD_A (PLACE 43 / HUMAN_OR_INSTITUTION 23); 2 of 4 load-bearing classes absent (OPERATOR_OR_RELATION, QUALIFIER) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT)
uncertainty: WEAK_SILVER_B (20) for the absent classes shares one decipherment -> not load-bearing
power: forecasts NO_POWER (thin non-trivial pool, 2 classes missing)
ablations_robustness: structural labels are edition-independent but NOT load-bearing (excluded per Sec II)
contamination_leakage: index labels share source with any future gold (circularity noted downstream)
strongest_authorized_claim: Only 66 non-trivial, 2-class role labels are deterministically buildable no-human
forbidden_stronger_claim: Any semantic role assignment to LA forms
supersession_relations: Feeds NOHUM-03 weak supervision + NOHUM-04 power gate

canonical_name: Weak-supervision labeling functions (13 LFs, WS0-4) + circularity audit
research_question: Do deterministic labeling functions produce an edition-INDEPENDENT structural signal for the load-bearing role classes (once index LFs, which share the gold source, are separated out)?
scientific_outcome: NULL (edition-independent structural signal ~0; index-LF precision is circular)
mechanical_verdict: coverage 0.71 / abstain 0.29 / conflict 0.044; index-LF precision on gold=1.0 CIRCULAR; honest EDITION_INDEPENDENT structural signal precision=0.026
data_sources: 4,759 LB content forms; 66 nontrivial gold; corpus_version=source-labels-v1
source_dependencies: index LFs SHARED_DECIPHERMENT with gold (circular); structural LFs EDITION_INDEPENDENT
effective_n: n_forms=4,759; n_gold_nontrivial=66; WS covered gold=60 (WS0-3), 23 (WS4 conservative) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT weak_supervision_metrics.json)
features_channels: 14 LF entries (13 base LFs + LF_CROSS_SOURCE_CONCORDANCE CROSS_CLASS): toponym/title/person/operator/qualifier index (SHARED) + logogram-adjacency/numeral-position/entry-position/document-series/recurrence/header-position/total-position/negative-exclusion (EDITION_INDEPENDENT)
algorithm_model: WS0 majority / WS1 source-weighted / WS2 generative / WS3 dependency-aware / WS4 conservative intersection
preregistration_plan_hash: weak_supervision_freeze.json (frozen=true, not tuned on sealed/future eval)
primary_metric_value: coverage 0.7081; conflict 0.0441; abstain 0.2919; edition-independent structural precision 0.026 (report/power_gate); index-LF precision on gold 1.0 = circular (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT weak_supervision_metrics.json + power_gate.json)
uncertainty: WS0-3 est_precision_on_gold=1.0 is optimistic/circular (LFs share source with gold)
power: structural signal 0.026 << majority baseline 0.652 -> no usable edition-independent signal
ablations_robustness: WS1 vs WS3 dependency-aware sensitivity = 0.0 (dependency modeling changes nothing at this scale)
contamination_leakage: circularity explicitly flagged: index LFs share source with gold
strongest_authorized_claim: The only non-circular (edition-independent) structural signal is ~0.026, far below baseline
forbidden_stronger_claim: That the 1.0 index-LF precision is real predictive signal
limitations_blockers: Load-bearing signal is circular; genuine structural signal is null

research_question: Given the thin 2-class 66-unit gold + 0.026 edition-independent signal, can a pseudo-script (O2+D8) transfer model achieve useful power on a grouped sealed set?
claim_layer: L4 (functional role) — power analysis before modeling
implementation_status: POWER_GATED_BEFORE_RUN (Stage 5 NOT frozen/implemented; STOP per Sec VII)
algorithm_model: analytic power estimate for a simulated O2+D8 transfer model
search_space_params: majority baseline 0.652; sites below power MY/TI/KH
heldout_design: grouped sealed set (19 units) proposed but NOT run
primary_metric_value: est O2+D8 model accuracy 0.291 << min-detectable 0.92 at n=19 -> power_at_est_O2_D8 = 0.0; 2 load-bearing classes absent (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT power_gate.json)
power: 0.0 (definitive underpower); a larger model cannot repair a 19-unit sealed set or 2 missing classes
ablations_robustness: confirms dependency-audit forecast (A12/no-lexical-identity has no signal)
strongest_authorized_claim: The label-based semantic-role benchmark cannot be evaluated with adequate power no-human; route CLOSED as a rigorous negative
forbidden_stronger_claim: That Linear A lacks recoverable signal (explicitly disclaimed in ROUTE_CLOSURE)
limitations_blockers: Not INCOMPLETE (corpus + LFs built); a genuine negative. Do not enlarge unless a new source crosses >=3 load-bearing classes threshold
supersession_relations: Route CLOSED -> pivot to observable_channels programme (OBS-*)
verdict_ledger_reference: DECISION_LOG.md 2026-07-07 Pre-Stage-5 power gate; STATUS.md NO_POWER_BEFORE_MODELING

canonical_name: Experiment 1 — masked logogram (commodity channel) recovery from opaque word context
research_question: Under unseen lexical-family (A12) + cross-site controls, does opaque word context predict the entry's commodity logogram beyond the frequency + document-series shortcut and beyond a label-shuffle null?
method_family: masked-target prediction (Naive-Bayes sign-bag M_sign + structure M_struct; masked_logogram.py)
mechanical_verdict: NEGATIVE — word-context does NOT beat series shortcut, transfers negatively cross-site; signal is the document-series shortcut, not transferable word context
source_dependencies: inherits ADMIN-03 graph via no_human parent
effective_n: 3,711 examples / 2,312 train / 457 unseen-family (A12) test; cross-site nonKN n=234 (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT masked_logogram.json); independence_unit=lexical/morphological family
features_channels: opaque word forms + order + neighbours + numerals + layout; 115 distinct logograms
heldout_design: hold out complete lexical + morphological families (A12); cross-site KN->nonKN
positive_negative_controls: null = label shuffle (0.144); baselines frequency (0.175) + document-series shortcut (0.63)
multiplicity_correction: min detectable over series computed (0.69 at n=457)
primary_metric_value: M_sign 0.182 vs freq 0.175 / series 0.63 / null 0.144; M_struct 0.186; cross-site KN->nonKN M_sign 0.073 vs baseline 0.115 (NEGATIVE transfer) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT masked_logogram.json)
power: well-powered (457 A12 units; fixed the label-route underpower)
contamination_leakage: A12 removes lexical identity; series shortcut explicitly the convenience to remove
strongest_authorized_claim: Commodity is fixed by the document/series, not by transferable opaque word context
forbidden_stronger_claim: That word forms carry commodity meaning; any LA semantic output
limitations_blockers: Signal is a series shortcut; fails beat-baseline + cross-site + no-series conditions
supersession_relations: Channel 1 of 2 L3 negatives feeding GATE_VERDICT (OBS-07)

canonical_name: Experiment 2 — masked quantity/accounting channel recovery (presence + magnitude)
research_question: Under A12, does opaque word context predict quantity PRESENCE and MAGNITUDE bucket beyond layout, the series shortcut, and a label-shuffle null, and does it transfer cross-site?
method_family: masked-target prediction, two targets (presence, S/M/L magnitude); masked_quantity.py
scientific_outcome: REFUTED (TRIVIAL_RECOVERY for functional word-context; only LAYOUT/L2 beats baseline)
mechanical_verdict: per-channel NEGATIVE: M_sign below majority on presence and below null on magnitude; only M_struct (layout, L2) beats baseline
data_sources: DAMOS LB de-phoneticised graph; numeral never enters presence predictor; magnitude = masked numeral value
effective_n: 9,432 examples / 6,311 train / 1,593 unseen-family (A12) test (presence); magnitude n=510; cross-site nonKN 539 (presence) / 239 (magnitude) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT masked_quantity.json)
features_channels: opaque word context (M_sign) vs layout position/#words/length (M_struct)
algorithm_model: M_sign / M_struct classifiers; target (a) presence, target (b) S/M/L bucket
preregistration_plan_hash: Art. XXII stage header; charter gate; COMPLIANT (A12 enforced, numeral excluded)
heldout_design: A12 unseen-family; cross-site KN->nonKN both targets
positive_negative_controls: null = label shuffle (presence 0.611 / magnitude 0.665); baselines majority + series shortcut
multiplicity_correction: two targets reported separately; verdict fail-closed
primary_metric_value: Presence: M_sign 0.651 < majority 0.680 / series 0.688 / null 0.611; M_struct 0.709; cross-site 0.579 vs 0.557. Magnitude: M_sign 0.637 < null 0.665; series 0.702; cross-site 0.69 vs 0.753 (negative) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT masked_quantity.json)
uncertainty: sign_beats_best_baseline=false both targets; sign_beats_null=false on magnitude
contamination_leakage: masked numeral excluded from predictor; A12 enforced
strongest_authorized_claim: Recoverable quantity signal is document-structure/layout (L2), not transferable word forms (L3)
forbidden_stronger_claim: That word forms carry the accounting channel; any LA output
limitations_blockers: Word-context negative; structure-recovery re-confirms L2 only
supersession_relations: Channel 2 of 2 L3 negatives -> GATE_VERDICT (OBS-07); layout positive characterized in OBS-03/04

research_question: Is 'list + total' accounting closure a real above-null document structure, and does it reconstruct a masked line item beyond a median baseline?
scientific_outcome: STRUCTURAL_ONLY (L2 positive but sparse; exact where present)
mechanical_verdict: closure 0.071 > null 0.049 (real but sparse); masked-summand reconstruction 1.000 vs 0.200 baseline where closing
effective_n: 350 docs with >=3 numeric entries; masked-summand n=25 closing docs; cross-site KN 117 / nonKN 233 (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT accounting_closure.json)
preregistration_plan_hash: Art. XXII stage header; masks a summand never the total (Art. XII, no circular self-grade)
positive_negative_controls: value-permutation null (exact 0.049 / tol1 0.143); median baseline 0.200 for reconstruction
primary_metric_value: closure exact 0.071 vs null 0.049; tol1 0.214 vs 0.143; KN 0.111 / nonKN 0.052; masked-summand reconstruction 1.000 vs 0.200 (n=25) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT accounting_closure.json)
uncertainty: 7% exact is a LOWER BOUND (detector catches only simplest largest=sum form)
power: closure concentrated at KN (formal totals); minority of documents
contamination_leakage: masked summand excluded from its own reconstruction
licence_earned: NONE (L2 known layer; earns no functional licence)
strongest_authorized_claim: Where accounting closes, a masked line item is arithmetically exactly recoverable, but closure is sparse
forbidden_stronger_claim: That closure advances the L3 functional question or an LA reading
supersession_relations: Second structural channel evaluated by STRUCTURAL gate (OBS-06); feeds GATE_VERDICT

research_question: Are LB documents internally templated — does the rest of a document predict a masked entry's notation type beyond global/position base rates, on unseen documents?
mechanical_verdict: M_template 0.508 > position 0.398 > global 0.338 on unseen docs; strong at nonKN (0.633), absent at KN (0.407 < 0.443 baseline)
effective_n: 1,186 docs (>=3 entries) / 911 train / 275 test docs; 1,324 masked (KN 733 / nonKN 591) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT template_completion.json); independence_unit=document
features_channels: notation-type signature (word/logogram/numeral); 7 distinct entry types; no word-form identity
preregistration_plan_hash: Art. XXII header; held out by whole document (no memorized layout)
heldout_design: unseen documents; cross-site KN vs nonKN split reported
primary_metric_value: M_template 0.508 vs position 0.398 / global 0.338 (n=1324); KN 0.407 (< 0.443 base); nonKN 0.633 (vs 0.342 base, +0.29) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT template_completion.json)
uncertainty: site-dependent — single-direction cross-site (absent at KN where one type dominates)
ablations_robustness: cross-site both sites reported; robustness tested further in OBS-05/06
contamination_leakage: masked entry excluded; held out by document
strongest_authorized_claim: LB documents are internally templated (held-out L2 signal), but site-dependent
forbidden_stronger_claim: That template regularity is a transferable reading; any LA output
supersession_relations: Primary structural channel entering STRUCTURAL gate (OBS-05/06); feeds GATE_VERDICT

canonical_name: Experiment 5 — cross-site invariance of the template grammar (STRUCTURAL gate leg)
research_question: Is the L2 notation-type template grammar the SAME across sites (bidirectional transfer above each target baseline + low type-distribution divergence), or site-dependent?
method_family: cross-site transfer + type-distribution divergence + site-shuffle null (cross_site_invariance.py)
scientific_outcome: STRUCTURAL_ONLY (bidirectional but SITE_DEPENDENT; STRUCTURAL licence NOT_EARNED leg)
mechanical_verdict: SITE_DEPENDENT — template beats target baseline both directions but TVD 0.28 + gap null-p 0.0
effective_n: 1,186 docs (KN 794 / nonKN 392); KN->nonKN n=2711; nonKN->KN n=2980 (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT cross_site_invariance.json)
preregistration_plan_hash: Art. XXII header; STRUCTURAL-licence gate leg (Art. XV)
primary_metric_value: KN->nonKN template 0.616 vs 0.238 baseline; nonKN->KN 0.389 vs 0.289; entry-type TVD 0.281; cross-site gap 0.227; site-shuffle null p=0.000 (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT cross_site_invariance.json)
uncertainty: gap is real (null p=0.0), not noise
ablations_robustness: bidirectional transfer confirmed; but type-mix site-specific
contamination_leakage: site identity removed as a feature
strongest_authorized_claim: Template regularity transfers both directions but the notation-type inventory is site-specific (partial transfer, not invariance)
forbidden_stronger_claim: That the template grammar is site-invariant / a transferable reading
limitations_blockers: TVD 0.28 + significant gap => STRUCTURAL gate not cleared on invariance
supersession_relations: One of two STRUCTURAL-gate failure grounds -> GATE_VERDICT NOT_EARNED

canonical_name: Experiment 6 — pseudo-script O2 (sign permutation) + D8 (LA-like sparsity) stress test
research_question: Do the L2 structural signals survive O2 (sign-ID permutation) and D8 (LA-like sparsity), and what does sign-invariance imply about their information content?
scientific_outcome: STRUCTURAL_ONLY (template O2-robust but sign-agnostic/content-free; closure D8-fragile)
mechanical_verdict: O2: template 0.497 = 0.497 (identical -> carries NO sign/lexical content); D8: template robust, closure decays to null (0.033 vs 0.054 at 35% retention)
data_sources: DAMOS LB; LA corpus density as a corpus-statistic only (no LA model result)
effective_n: D8 sweep n_docs>=3: 1,186 / 442 / 224 / 158 at keep_frac 1.0/0.75/0.5/0.35 (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT pseudo_script_o2d8.json)
algorithm_model: O2 sign-ID permutation; D8 entry-sparsity thinning sweep
preregistration_plan_hash: Art. XXII header; charter primary benchmark = O2+D8
positive_negative_controls: template_baseline per level; null_closure_rate per level
primary_metric_value: O2 template 0.497->0.497 identical; D8 template 0.497/0.591/0.602/0.589 (> baseline 0.408->0.48); closure 0.071/0.049/0.047/0.033 vs null 0.049/0.036/0.008/0.054; LA vs LB density mean 2.73 vs 2.29 entries/doc, both 28% >=3 entries (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT pseudo_script_o2d8.json)
uncertainty: sign-invariance = pure positional/arithmetic grammar, no L1/L3 information (honest flip side)
power: LA density comparable to LB -> D8 mild; L2 grammar would be measurable on LA IF a STRUCTURAL licence were earned
ablations_robustness: template survives O2+D8; closure fragile (decays to null under D8)
contamination_leakage: O2 scrambles sign identity (model never sees permutation key)
strongest_authorized_claim: The one robust structural signal is sign-agnostic positional/document grammar — the paper's already-known L2 layer, not a transferable reading
forbidden_stronger_claim: That the surviving signal carries sign/lexical/functional content; any LA reading
limitations_blockers: content-free + closure D8-fragile => even the weakest transfer licence not earned

research_question: Can opaque word forms predict independently-observable admin channels once lexical identity, site and series shortcuts are controlled (FUNCTIONAL) and does any structural channel earn even a STRUCTURAL licence?
method_family: mechanical gate synthesis over Exp 1-6 (Art. XV/XVI)
scientific_outcome: REFUTED (L3) + NO_POWER/NOT_EARNED (L2 structural-transfer) = complete well-powered negative
mechanical_verdict: OBSERVABLE_CHANNEL_READY = NO; FUNCTIONAL_TRANSFER_LICENSE NOT_EARNED; STRUCTURAL_TRANSFER_LICENSE NOT_EARNED
data_sources: synthesis of Exp 1-6 result JSONs; corpus_version=DAMOS-derived
effective_n: 457 + 1,593 A12 units across the two L3 channels (well-powered) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT gate)
algorithm_model: gate condition table (charter conditions ALL required)
heldout_design: aggregates A12 + cross-site + O2+D8 from constituent experiments
multiplicity_correction: success required on >=2 channels at L3 — achieved 0 of 2
primary_metric_value: 0 of 2 L3 channels beat baseline; both structural-gate legs fail (SITE_DEPENDENT + D8-fragile + sign-agnostic) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT via constituent JSONs)
uncertainty: the L2 signal that exists is real but content-free positional grammar (already-known paper layer)
power: well-powered negative (not underpower, unlike the label route)
ablations_robustness: consistent with label-route NO_POWER and Egyptian-anchor TRIVIAL_RECOVERY
contamination_leakage: A12 enforced across all L3 channels
licence_earned: NONE (SEMANTIC+ NOT_AUTHORIZED; no LA output authorized)
strongest_authorized_claim: The observable-channel word-form->function route is a complete, well-powered negative; document structure that exists is the already-known L2 layer
forbidden_stronger_claim: Any LA semantic/functional reading; that a structural licence was earned
supersession_relations: Closes the admin_structure lineage; consistent with NOHUM-04 and ADMIN-06 negatives
